column1: # INTERIM svc hub DM backchannel routes.
# DEMOTE svc<->lab TO BREAK-GLASS AT T-06622; svc<->max3 AT T-06672.
# max3 has the established estate, so its routes are explicit live scopes.
# Deliberately omit colliding scope refs that also exist on svc.
# mable cross-node coordination seat on max3 (Lance-authorized 2026-07-20); host=node so the
# minisvc/minilab <host><node> convention collapses to the bare node name.
